title: KNAB raises eyebrows at New Unity politicians' Italy trip
summary_full: The Corruption Prevention and Combating Bureau (KNAB) has begun reviewing information regarding the participation of "New Unity" politicians in a seminar in Italy. KNAB stated on 14th April that it will not provide further comments until the investigation is complete.
